addons.name: actions
addons.description: Typed POST action handlers, form decoding, validation fragments, redirects, partial responses, and generated CSRF wiring.
securityNotes: Generated action POSTs use CSRF by default; application handlers still own domain authorization.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: api
addons.description: Generated request-time API routes and response helpers for supported handler signatures.
securityNotes: State-changing API methods use generated CSRF when enabled; public API auth policy stays app-owned.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: auth
addons.summary: PBKDF2, signed sessions, and RBAC guard helpers
addons.description: Experimental authentication plumbing with password hashing helpers, signed-cookie sessions, and runtime/auth provider integration.
securityNotes: Session secrets fail closed; user lookup, MFA, OAuth, and resource authorization stay app-owned.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: contracts
addons.description: Compiler and generated-route integration for typed command, query, event, and job contracts.
securityNotes: Web-role validation, guards, rate limits, and CSRF are generated around web contract endpoints.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: css
addons.description: Feature marker and public CSS processor contract for compile-time stylesheet output.
securityNotes: CSS processors run during builds and must not receive secrets through generated output.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: db
addons.description: Thin database/sql helpers for opening connections, readiness checks, transactions, and ordered SQL migrations.
securityNotes: Drivers, DSNs, schema ownership, data access policy, and authorization stay app-owned.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: embed
addons.summary: embed build output into the binary
addons.description: Generated app source and binary output that embeds selected build output.
processBehavior: go build when --bin or --wasm is requested
securityNotes: Embedded outputs skip known secret/private/temp artifacts; runtime secrets stay in environment/platform config.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: observability
addons.summary: generated app tracing and local trace viewer
addons.description: Opt-in generated route, endpoint, browser, and island tracing through dependency-free runtime/trace primitives.
networkBehavior: optional trace export through nested runtime/trace/otel module
securityNotes: Production sampling, access policy, and durable trace storage remain app-owned.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: partial
addons.description: Server fragments, partial action responses, and generated client swap integration.
securityNotes: Fragments are rendered through escaped runtime/render; auth/session policy remains app-owned.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: ratelimit
addons.description: Fixed-window request-time limiter hooks for generated routes with in-memory and Redis-backed store options.
networkBehavior: optional Redis store selected by app code
securityNotes: Limiter policy, store selection, trusted proxy inputs, and abuse-response strategy stay app-owned.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: realtime
addons.description: Opt-in generated presentation-event fanout using dependency-free SSE helpers or optional nested WebSocket transport.
networkBehavior: SSE connections for generated presentation streams; optional WebSocket nested module
securityNotes: Generated streams inherit guards; session revocation and replay policy remain app-owned hardening work.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: seo
addons.description: Build-time sitemap and robots output for public static and expanded SPA routes.
securityNotes: Only public routes should be included in generated crawler metadata.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: spa
addons.description: Static-first SPA feature marker and compatibility package for build-time output.
securityNotes: Browser navigation enhancement must not own auth, routing truth, or trusted validation.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module; addable for compatibility.

addons.name: ssr
addons.description: Request-time full-page rendering lane for pages with load blocks or go ssr blocks.
securityNotes: Request-time pages must keep auth, session, and data access policy in user-owned Go.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: static
addons.description: Build-time static page output boundary. It currently enables the shared spa feature ID.
securityNotes: Static output should not include non-public reports, secrets, or runtime-only data.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module and wired by gowdk add.

addons.name: tailwind
addons.summary: Tailwind CSS v4 standalone CLI wrapper
addons.description: Experimental CSS processor wrapper around an app-installed Tailwind standalone executable.
processBehavior: runs configured tailwindcss executable during builds
securityNotes: GOWDK does not download Tailwind, run npm, or execute through a shell; projects must pin and review their executable.

trust.notes: Shipped in the root GOWDK module but not wired by gowdk add because it needs project-specific options.
